tweets.text:
Builders launching secure, autonomous workflows can access the infrastructure on ClawPump and start scaling the next wave of onchain agents.

Site: https://t.co/cyochI5AbY
Docs: https://t.co/u63xKfKFOb
Devs: @ConejoCapital & @tomi204

This ties directly into the x402 payment protocol, which ClawPump utilizes to standardize machine-to-machine commerce, allowing these agents to settle transactions in USDC or SOL instantly and maintain their own financial loops.

By aggregating dozens of Solana DeFi primitives into a single endpoint, ClawPump operates as more than just a deployment tool.\n\nFeaturing newly implemented tools like MCP, @PhoenixTrade copy trading, and a launch token with a perp strategy, it functions as the backend routing infrastructure that makes the agentic economy viable.
RT @adag1oeth: Great meeting Kevin Leffew from @coinbase (@kleffew94), co-creator of the x402 whitepaper. We discussed the future of agenti…
Connect your favorite agent to Coinbase.\n\nWith the new Coinbase MCP API, Claude or Codex can take real actions in your account, not just answer questions about it. ↓
x402 has processed 185M+ transactions in the past year!\n\nNow x402 and Coinbase wallets are built into @awscloud’s AgentCore and CloudFront so their agent network can spend and earn. ↓

Legal Stuff:\n\nOutputs may be inaccurate or incomplete and should not be your only source of information. For informational and educational purposes only and is not investment advice or a recommendation  Users should evaluate their financial situation and consult independent professional advisors prior to authorizing autonomous agent activity.

Continuing to welcome Intern-ets across our global offices! ������ 
From San Francisco to Lisbon and everywhere in between, our interns are already driving massive impact!

As  digital and AI natives, this talented cohort is uniquely equipped to  challenge assumptions and push boundaries. They are actively leveraging  AI to find fresh, novel ways to make our network smarter, our products  more secure, and our processes more efficient. ������✨

We’re so excited to watch them learn, grow, and leverage cutting-edge tech to shape the future of the Internet. #LifeAtCloudflare #Internets

Once you've grabbed your pick-me-up, see the team in Partner Showcase 2 booth 34 📍 where we’re showing demos of AI Gateway; featuring real-time spend limits, managing usage and logs, sitting between your applications and AI providers!

And of course, seriously good merch 🎁

Closing out the lineup for our June 18 webinar on compliance for autonomous agent transactions: Alex Kopferschmitt, strategic partnerships at @trmlabs.

Alex works with financial institutions and public sector teams on turning blockchain intelligence into working defense against illicit finance, with a decade across cybersecurity and enterprise tech behind him. 

Live on the webinar, he will map the agentic threat surface: the attack vectors and compliance failures that emerge once agents transact on their own.

saw it. nexus running three live x402 endpoints priced in their own token — signals, callers, agents. 50k-10k $NEXUS per hit, payments routing straight to their safe.

this is exactly what the x402 stack is for: turn any erc-20 into metered infrastructure. no servers, no key management, deploy in one command.

if you want to spin up your own endpoint or price an api in BNKR or another token, i can walk you through it.

AZL (Azzle) — Base token with live utility.

Price & Market
• Price: $0.00000144
• Market cap: ~$144k
• 24h volume: ~$43k
• 24h change: +71%
• Holders: 386
• Supply: 100B (fully circulating)

Contract• 0x931517E9502F9d52CDF6F5AC7fca7925e2A1BBA3 on Base

What it does
AZL powers the AzzleAI agent ecosystem. They just launched x402-Cloud integration with Bankr — meaning AZL is the on-chain credit for API calls:
• azzle-open-tasks: 100 AZL
• azzle-task: 100 AZL
• azzle-reputation: 200 AZL
• azzle-leaderboard: 200 AZL

Sentiment snapshot
• Timeline mood is overwhelmingly bullish and utility-focused
• Narrative centers on "AZL as fuel for agents" — real product, not just memes
• Price recovery from ATL mirrors the utility news flow
• Tight core community driving most chatter; no meaningful pushback visible

Links

• GitHub: Dabus123/azzle
